message:
fix(unix): add explicit usize casts for cross-platform cmsg portability

Add explicit `as usize` casts to cmsg_len and msg_controllen fields in
the Unix ancillary message and stream handling code. These fields are
size_t (usize) on Linux but socklen_t (u32) on macOS/BSD, causing type
mismatch errors when compiling on Darwin targets.

- ancillary.rs: cast (*cmsg_ptr).cmsg_len to usize, extract
  size_of::<cmsghdr>() into a local hdr_size variable for reuse,
  add explanatory comments about CMSG_SPACE bounds
- stream.rs: cast msg.msg_controllen to usize before passing to
  ancillary.set_len(), add comment explaining the portability concern

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
